heading: Omitted
label: 785 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , which authorized issuance of rules and regulations necessary for the purposes of former sections 781 to 785 of this title, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.act Aug. 1, 1955, ch. 444, § 669 Stat. 432
